title: gaultheria leucocarpa var. hirsuta
intro: Gaultheria leucocarpa var. hirsuta is a variety of the Gaultheria leucocarpa plant, commonly known as the mountain pepper or snowberry. This plant is a shrub native to New Caledonia, which belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae), and is valued for its medicinal and culinary properties. The medicinal properties of Gaultheria leucocarpa var. hirsuta include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and providing antioxidant protection, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
